steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
The question asks for the function value when the input is $3$. Replace $x$ with $3$ in the given rule before doing any arithmetic.
$$k(3)=3^3+40$$

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content:
Evaluate the exponent first: $3^3$ means $3\cdot3\cdot3$, which equals $27$. Then add the constant term from the function rule.
$$k(3)=27+40$$
$$k(3)=67$$
The answer is D.
